use_cases: Creating frosted glass card containers with backdrop blur effects
Adding premium glass effects to dashboard widgets
Implementing translucent overlays in modern web interfaces
ai_summary: A glass-morphism wrapper component that creates a frosted glass effect using backdrop blur, translucent white layers, and inset box shadows. Features smooth hover animations with padding and border-radius transitions. Includes a GlassDock sub-component for creating macOS-style icon docks with the liquid glass aesthetic. The component uses SVG filters for distortion effects and supports link wrapping for clickable glass cards.
